ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "squad" TEXT /* Squad designation (e.g., Senior, Junior) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the game was played */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game result (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_squad FOREIGN KEY ("squad") REFERENCES squad_details ("squad_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES game_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "squad" TEXT /* Squad designation (e.g., Senior, Junior) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Player's preferred foot (left, right) */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Player's current market value in the transfer market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squad_details" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the squad */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the squad competes */,
  "season" TEXT /* Current season for the squad */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the squad */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the players in the squad */,
  "total_market_value" REAL /* Total market value of the squad */,
  "training_ground" TEXT /* Name of the training ground used by the squad */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the squad */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the opponent competes */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the opponent is a home or away team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the opponent plays */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the opponent's squad */,
  "total_market_value" REAL /* Total market value of the opponent's squad */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the opponent */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance across all games in the league */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer in the league */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* Name of the top assister in the league */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the game result (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the action occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the disciplinary action */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the disciplinary action occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disciplinary action */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee who issued the disciplinary action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shot_statistics" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot taken (e.g., Free Kick, Penalty) */,
  "shot_success" INTEGER /* Whether the shot was successful */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the shot was taken */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the goal when the shot was taken */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the shot relative to the goal */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part used to take the shot (e.g., left foot, right foot, head) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dribble_statistics" (
  "dribble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dribble */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "dribble_success" INTEGER /* Whether the dribble was successful */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the dribble occurred */,
  "start_position" TEXT /* Starting position of the dribble */,
  "end_position" TEXT /* Ending position of the dribble */,
  "opponent_player" TEXT /* Name of the opponent player involved in the dribble */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dribble_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used */,
  "training_data_date" TEXT /* Date when the training data was collected */,
  "last_prediction" TEXT /* Date of the last prediction made using the model */,
  "next_update" TEXT /* Date when the model is scheduled for the next update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
